title: Peak Custom GUI Pack
description: Adds female characters from popular romance anime's into block and inventory GUI. Also changes the panorama.
body:
Adds female characters from popular romance anime's into block and inventory GUI. Also changes the panorama. 
> Adds new GUI to following blocks:
- Anvil - Mai Sakurajima from Rascal Does Not Dream Series
- Beacon - Maria (Masha) Mikhailovna Kujou from Alya Sometimes Hides Her Feelings in Russian
- Furnace/Blast Furnace/Smoker - Minami Fuyuki from Hokkaido Gals Are Super Adorable!
- Brewing Stand - Sayuri Akino from Hokkaido Gals Are Super Adorable!
- Cartography Table - Kyouko Hori from Horimiya 
- Crafting Table/Crafter - Kaoruko Waguri from The Fragrant Flower Blooms with Dignity
- Dispenser/Dropper - Akari Watanabe from More Than a Married Couple, But Not Lovers
- Enchanting Table - Umi Asanagi from I Made Friends with the Second Prettiest Girl in My Class
- Chest/Ender Chest/Copper Chest/Trapped Chest/Barrel - Alisa (Alya) Mikhailovna Kujou from Alya Sometimes Hides Her Feelings in Russian
- Grindstone - Nene Himekawa from Tune In to the Midnight Heart
- Hopper - Miyako Shikimori from Shikimori's Not Just a Cutie
- Shulker Box - Mahiru Shiina from The Angel Next Door Spoils Me Rotten
- Smithing Table - Iko Kirino from Tune In to the Midnight Heart
- Stonecutter - Rikka Inohana from Tune In to the Midnight Heart
- Panorama - Ichika Nakano, Nino Nakano, Miku Nakano, Yotsuba Nakano, Itsuki Nakano from The Quintessential Quintuplets
- Inventory - Marin Kitagawa from My Dress-Up Darling
- Gamemode Switcher - Shinobu Uzuki from Tune In to the Midnight Heart

More GUIs will be added in the future!
